content: thank you.. just had to be sure lol these kinda games have so many abbreviations you just never know sometimes lol
Anyone doing the code event sharing event?
The beginning was interesting with the backgrounds music
Then it got weird and it went bad
You can receive invite after 7 days of account creation
You can only send it for now
Ahh ic, thanks for the tid bit
You can still share it there if you want
But shared is capped like 50 players
Most of us already done it
Just saw it and asking around the community
Is there anyone with a claymore and flame related abilities
Does Mavuika from Genshin Impact count?
Could've specified what you said dipshit.
There's only someone with flame related abilities which is Kathigu-Ra.
I love ||my wife Priestess, who did nothing wrong, ever||
bum ass doc scared of a debate 😂
~~get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head get out of my head~~
I barely read anything about characters
Just chose a random event to do
Ohhhhh yeah i barely read anything about the relics just picked and hoped for the best
You should probably make a mental note on it
It's not really telling me what it does
Nah, you gotta go to Stage then check Relics
If you go to Archives, it will only show you flavour text
In Arc 1, go to Stage > Faded Legacy > Stage Relics
Then you can check to see the available Relics, as well as read each of their relative Effects
If search up the boss intentions it could probably be good
enthralling chime actually has no drawback
because u can technically just end turn to see what the boss does, then reset with perfect information
but if u are patient enough to memorize the boss intentions then its literally just free arith and a card
so if you were trying to do pdive legendary then its the meta relic
you dont see the exact damage or shield amount
Madness and pdive are hell together they are super hell
So thats why I couldn't see anything 😭
I listened to some of her voicelines
something something asking you to lick and see if she's dripping wax or something else
I will never buy candle wax ever again
I could have lived the rest of my life without seeing this
lmao, you'll have to see it if you get copies of her
Plz tell me this is just the English slightly mistranslation
hold on, I'm pretty sure I took a screenshot, let me check my phone
Thank goodness I only have 1 of her
Oh wait, nvm I have 3 of her
I will never look at candle wax the same ever again
she also calls you a Good boy/girl depending on which MC you chose
she's the sadism to Leigh's masochism
Would be funny if they gender swapped all the awakeners depending on the MC
have to mute any time either her or Leigh are the bosses I have to fight, wouldn't want anyone wondering about the *noises*
She's an excellent example pf reasons why I dont tell people I watch anime
Imagine a blind man hearing her voicelines
I don’t play games on my phone anymore, especially gacha games.
Are there any blind people that play Morimens?
Eh probably, unless they're completely blind.
wanda clowns on her in her voicelines
and when pandia meets leigh in story, leigh is too freaky for her
I see that word everyday what does it mean💔
she gets scared off by the actual masochist lol
Might also be a larper i barely read anything about relics
I just pick the ones I know I like
don't care about the downsides, Red Brooch is going to be picked
I just look at the colors.
same with the cursed relic that turns all devours into Infinite Devour
it makes no difference to Sorel
The bell and the eggs one are not that good
After 3 weeks ik what this means
bell is very good like i said earlier, only annoying
Black Star Ember is also hella peak
I can get rid of two basic cards for free Strength
The hat tentacle cursed relic is good too
Can Wanda be considered as a black queen?
Yeah ig. Little grey in some areas
